intended_users: campus and early-career candidates with internship/project evidence
locked_layout_rules: A4 portrait, one page, zero print margin
name/meta/header at top, avatar at top-right
main sections follow recruiter reading order
main content bottom whitespace must not exceed 15%

ai_may_decide: whether to add campus experience, certificates, language ability, portfolio links, competitions, or tool chain content
whether optional content becomes its own section or is merged into another section
ai_must_not: move internship work into project experience
break the template grid or visual hierarchy

qa_gates: screenshot: no overlap, clipping, or QR collision
